heading: Procedure
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo create a new Data Federation private endpoint using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas dataFederation privateEndpoints create <endpointId> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dataFederation privateEndpoints create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-privateEndpoints-create).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo edit a private endpoint through the Atlas Administration API, send a `POST` request
to the `privateNetworkSettings` endpoint with the unique ID of the
private endpoint to edit.To learn more about the syntax and options, see [API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-creategroupprivatenetworksettingendpointid).**Ui:**Atlas UITo edit the details associated with a private endpoint from the Atlas UI:To learn more about the fields you can edit, see [Atlas Data Federation](config-private-endpoint).
